description: AutoTrader.ca is a Canadian online automotive marketplace for buying and selling vehicles. Its public site includes dealer-oriented backend/API help pages related to inventory, events, payments, incentives, and related services.
summary: autotrader.ca exposes at least two public HTTP API help surfaces: a dealer-focused REST API at dealerapi.autotrader.ca and a minimal TDR API help page at tdr.autotrader.ca; no public GraphQL, MCP, CLI, or authentication documentation was found.
